flight_plan.route_of_flight: KPAO SAC KSTS direct (VFR, following Hwy 101 to San Francisco Bay, then V-108 to SAC, then direct to KSTS)
flight_plan.destination_name_of_airport_and_city: KSTS (Charles M. Schulz–Sonoma County Airport, Santa Rosa, CA)
flight_plan.remarks: DAY VFR. PRIMARY COM 122.80 EN ROUTE FLIGHT FOLLOWING REQUESTED WITH NORCAL APPROACH. PILOT IN COMMAND: DAVID R. HERNANDEZ, PRIVATE PILOT ASEL, 185 HRS TT, 95 HRS PIC. PASSENGER: SPOUSE (1) AND CHILD (1), BOTH BRIEFED ON SEATBELTS, EMERGENCY EGRESS, AND NO-SMOKING POLICY. LIFE VESTS NOT CARRIED (COASTAL BUT INLAND ROUTE SELECTED TO AVOID EXTENDED OVERWATER). CARRYING CURRENT SECTIONAL CHARTS (SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO TERMINAL AREA CHART). EFB: IPAD MINI WITH FOREFLIGHT, STRATUS ADS-B RECEIVER, BACKUP PAPER CHECKLISTS. AIRCRAFT EQUIPPED WITH 406 MHZ ELT, ADS-B OUT, DUAL COM RADIOS, MODE C TRANSPONDER. PILOT HAS CHECKED NOTAMS AND TFRS FOR BAY AREA AND SONOMA COUNTY, INCLUDING ANY STADIUM TFRS FOR SCHEDULED EVENTS. ROUTE AVOIDS CLASS B AIRSPACE AROUND KSFO BY REMAINING EAST OF BAY AND BELOW SHELF LIMITS UNTIL CLEAR. EXPECTED CRUISE POWER SETTING 2400 RPM, FUEL BURN APPROX 8.5 GPH. IN CASE OF DIVERSION, PRIMARY OPTIONS: KCCR, KVCB, KSTS. IF UNABLE TO CONTACT KSTS TOWER, WILL BROADCAST ON CTAF AND ENTER PATTERN FROM 45-DEGREE ENTRY TO DOWNWIND. FLIGHT IS PART OF FAMILY TRIP TO VISIT RELATIVES IN SANTA ROSA; NO HAZARDOUS MATERIALS OR CARGO CARRIED, ONLY PERSONAL LUGGAGE (APPROX 70 LBS TOTAL) SECURED IN AFT BAGGAGE COMPARTMENT WITH TIEDOWNS.
flight_plan.alternate_airports: KCCR (Concord, CA), KVCB (Nut Tree, Vacaville, CA)
